title: Caribbean Light: Bright, Lean & Weeknight-Quick
description: A lighter Caribbean set with grilled fish, citrus-chili shrimp, lean chicken, legumes, and garden-fresh sides. Pantry-first, no-pork, and rhythm-ready for your weekly flavor cycles.

meta.curation_notes: Favor grill/roast/quick-skillet; keep sauces bright and portions sensible. Lean proteins, legumes, hearty salads.
meta.serving_plan: Pair mains with coconut-lime rice, quinoa peas, mango slaw, or greens. Use craft bases to cut weeknight time.
meta.storage_policy: 2–3 days fridge for cooked items; 2–3 months freezer for proteins and rice; fresh salsas best within 3 days.

items.title: Grilled Citrus–Chili Snapper
items.description: Zesty lime/orange and mild chili on lean snapper; serve with mango slaw.
steps: Pat fish dry. Mix citrus, chili, oil, salt, pepper; brush on fish.
Grill or pan-sear 2–3 min/side until flaky.

items.title: Citrus–Chili Shrimp Skewers
items.description: Fast grill or broil; great over greens or coconut-lime rice.
steps: Toss shrimp with oil, chili, lime, salt; skewer.
Grill/broil 2–3 min/side until just pink.

items.title: Lean Jerk Chicken (Breast or Tenderloins)
items.description: All the jerk flavor, trimmed calories. Pair with mango slaw or quinoa peas.
ingredients: 2 tbsp jerk seasoning (or paste thinned with oil)
steps: Rub chicken with jerk seasoning, oil, and salt.
Grill or roast at 425°F / 220°C for 12–18 min to 165°F; rest and slice.

items.title: Island Chickpea Curry (Light)
items.description: A quick coconut-lite curry with peppers and greens.

meta.reheat: Simmer 5 min, thin with water if needed

steps: Sauté onion/garlic/pepper in oil 3–4 min.
Add curry; toast 30 sec. Stir in coconut milk and chickpeas; simmer 8–10 min.
Fold in greens to wilt; season.

items.title: Quinoa “Rice & Peas” (Coconut–Lime)
items.description: A lighter take on rice & peas with protein-rich quinoa.
ingredients: 1 cup cooked red beans or kidney beans
steps: Combine quinoa, coconut milk, water, beans, thyme, salt; simmer 15 min.
Rest 5 min; fluff with lime zest.

items.title: Mango–Lime Slaw
items.description: Crunchy, bright slaw for fish tacos, bowls, or jerk plates.
steps: Toss all; season to taste. Chill 10 min.

items.title: Pan-Seared Salmon with Green Seasoning
items.description: Quick sear with a spoon of green seasoning to finish.
steps: Season salmon; sear in oil 2–3 min/side.
Top with spoonful of green seasoning; rest 1 min.

items.title: Jerk Tofu Sheet Pan
items.description: Crispy-edged tofu with peppers and onions; toss with lime.
steps: Heat oven 425°F / 220°C. Toss tofu & veg with oil, jerk, salt.
Roast 20–25 min until edges crisp; finish with lime.

items.title: Quick Callaloo Sauté (or Spinach)
items.description: Garlicky, tender greens with a hint of chili.
steps: Sauté garlic in oil 30 sec; add greens, chili, salt.
Cook 2–4 min to tender.

items.title: Light Baked Plantains (No Fry)
items.description: Caramelized edges in the oven; minimal oil.
steps: Heat oven 425°F / 220°C; toss plantains with oil and salt.
Bake 15–18 min, flipping once, until caramelized.

items.title: Pineapple–Habanero Salsa (Craft Base)
items.description: Sweet-heat spoon sauce for fish, shrimp, and bowls.
steps: Mix all; rest 10 min to marry. Adjust heat/salt.

items.title: Green Seasoning (Craft Base)
items.description: Herb–garlic blend to finish grills, fish, and tofu.
steps: Blend smooth; thin with oil/lime to taste. Freeze in cubes if desired.

items.title: Quick Pickled Red Onions (Craft)
items.description: Bright topper for bowls, tacos, and salads.
steps: Warm vinegar, water, sugar, salt to dissolve.
Pour over onions in jar; cool and chill.
